basic_details.job_title: CUAP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Andhra Pradesh (CUAP) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website cuap.ac.in. A total of 60 vacancies have been announced through the CUAP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in concerned/relevant/allied subject, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016
qualification.details: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject. NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month or Rs. 1,500/- per lecture.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUAP to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUAP Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Professor positions at Central University of Andhra Pradesh is 07 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 60 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions across various departments at the Central University of Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks in the relevant subject, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1,000/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month, or Rs. 1,500/- per lecture.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the CUAP Assistant Professor recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of the university.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor positions advertised by Central University of Andhra Pradesh are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central University of Andhra Pradesh located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Andhra Pradesh is located in Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
